task_completion.description: Create at least three Bezier curve objects arranged in a plumbing layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender Outliner panel shows at least three distinct curve objects (e.g., BezierCurve, BezierCurve.001, BezierCurve.002), and the 3D viewport displays multiple curve paths.

task_completion.description: Apply bevel depth to the curves to form solid tubes, ensuring at least one pipe has a visible bend.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 3D viewport, the curves appear as solid 3D tubes rather than flat lines, and at least one tube has a clear curved/bent section. The Object Data Properties (green curve icon) shows a Bevel Depth value greater than 0.

task_completion.description: Apply a realistic copper material to all pipes with a warm orange-brown color, high metallic value, and moderate roughness.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Material Properties tab shows a material with an orange-brown Base Color, Metallic set high (near 1.0), and Roughness set moderately (0.2 - 0.5). In Material Preview or Rendered mode, the pipes visually resemble shiny copper.
A 'Blender Render' window is open displaying the rendered image of the copper pipe system, or the UI shows the rendering progress bar completing.
A Blender file save dialog or file manager shows the image being saved as 'pipe_render.png' in the '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/' directory.

task_completion.description: Save the Blender project file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/pipe_system.blend.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender window title bar displays 'pipe_system.blend' or a save dialog shows the project being saved to the '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Blender application to create the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show genuine interaction with Blender's 3D viewport, Outliner, and Properties panels, rather than just writing terminal commands.

integrity.description: The rendered image is genuinely produced from the modeled 3D scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: The layout, shapes, and bends of the pipes in the render window perfectly match the geometry visible in the 3D viewport.

integrity.description: The output files were not mocked or downloaded via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like 'touch pipe_render.png', 'touch pipe_system.blend', or 'wget' to download pre-existing images.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected project path: /home/ga/BlenderProjects/pipe_system.blend. Expected render path: /home/ga/BlenderProjects/pipe_render.png. The scene must contain at least 3 Bezier curve objects. Bevel depth must be applied to create solid tubes (note: verifier accepts up to 0.15m despite metadata claiming 0.08m). Copper material color must fall within RGB [0.5-1.0, 0.2-0.7, 0.05-0.4] (e.g., standard copper [0.875, 0.553, 0.221]), with metallic > 0.7.
